MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFFS PHYLICIA ROSE ON BEHALF OF THEMSELVES AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, AND IAN TERRELL's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for pro hac vice admission is ordered off calendar as to Department 301. This matter has been designated complex and singly assigned to Judge Ross of Department 606. (see 6/9/25 order).

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
